metadata.name: Set Up an A/B Test in a Testing Tool

description: A CRO specialist needs to set up a new A/B test in a tool like Google Optimize or Optimizely.

nodes.task_description: Create a new A/B test and define the URL of the page to be tested.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly sets up the basic experiment.

nodes.task_description: Use the visual editor to create the variant (version B) by changing the text of the main headline.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the test variant.

nodes.task_description: Set the primary conversion goal for the test (e.g., tracking clicks on the CTA button).

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly defines what success looks like for the test.

nodes.task_description: Launch the experiment to start showing the versions to users.

expected_outcome.value: The A/B test is now live.
